DJI|FC6310._description: DJI Phantom 4 Pro — 1-inch CMOS, 20MP, mechanical shutter

SONY|ILCE-7M3._description: Sony A7 III full-frame — drone-mounted survey camera, common with 35mm fixed lens. Key cased 'SONY|ILCE-7M3' to match EXIF.Make literal output on real Sony bodies.

SONY|ILCE-6000._description: Sony A6000 — 24.3MP APS-C Exmor CMOS, E-mount mirrorless. Sensor dimensions are the published Sony APS-C spec (23.5x15.6mm). Focal length 16mm matches EXIF on the current survey (stdev=0 across all 142 frames; likely a fixed 16mm prime such as the SEL16F28). Key cased 'SONY|ILCE-6000' to match EXIF.Make literal output. Distortion coefficients (principal_point, k1..p2) are null = unmeasured for this body; ODM applies its own defaults at processing time. calibration_date is a placeholder one month pre-survey — replace with the real calibration date when known.
